original_text:
### Charts & Infographics
- Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
- **Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.** Placebo/comparator: neutral gray.
- Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).
- Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
- Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
- Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

relations.note: Both rules govern the visual system for chart and infographic sections.
Both establish typography hierarchy within chart sections.
Both distinguish primary chart data from supporting information.

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Keep data presentations approachable, scannable, and visually consistent with the system.
rules.rule_text: Chart and infographic containers must be clean and easy to scan, using a Light Blue panel (#E6F0F9) with uniform rounded corners and a rounded Brand Blue header bar (#00529b).

quotes: Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only. Placebo/comparator: neutral gray.

rules.intent: Create a consistent visual hierarchy that distinguishes key data without overstating comparator results.
rules.rule_text: Charts and infographics use Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) as dominant colors. Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) are reserved for emphasis on key figures or data points only; placebo and comparator data use neutral gray.

quotes: Bars and chart icons: rounded, approachable shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Make data graphics feel accessible and aligned with the brand’s friendly visual language.
rules.rule_text: Chart bars and chart icons must use rounded, approachable shapes, including rounded bar tops.

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Give chart headlines a distinctive, high-visibility hierarchy across print and email.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines use Agenda in print and Nunito Sans Bold+ in email, in ALL CAPS and Brand Blue (#00529b), with a thin Gold rule (#ffc60a) beneath.

quotes: Statistical callouts: large and bold (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath.
Statistical callouts: large and bold (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a lighter weight beneath.

rules.intent: Prioritize the primary statistic while retaining readable explanatory context.
rules.rule_text: Statistical callouts make the percentage figure the large, bold hero, with lighter-weight supporting copy positioned beneath it.

quotes: Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Preserve data hierarchy while keeping supporting references available.
rules.rule_text: Chart footnotes must be noticeably smaller and clearly separated from primary data.
